commandText:
SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Courses" AS c

SELECT c."Id", c."AcademicYear", c."Code", c."CreatedAt", c."CreatedBy", c."CreditHours", c."CurrentEnrollment", c."DeletedAt", c."DeletedBy", c."Department", c."Description", c."EndDate", c."Level", c."MaxEnrollment", c."PrerequisiteCreditHours", c."Semester", c."StartDate", c."Status", c."Title", c."UpdatedAt", c."UpdatedBy", c."Version"
FROM "Courses" AS c
ORDER BY c."Title"
LIMIT @__p_1 OFFSET @__p_0

commandText: LOCK TABLE "__EFMigrationsHistory" IN ACCESS EXCLUSIVE MODE

CREATE TABLE "Attendances" (
    "Id" integer GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
    "StudentId" integer NOT NULL,
    "CourseId" integer NOT NULL,
    "Date" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "IsPresent" boolean NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_Attendances" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);

CREATE TABLE "Teachers" (
    "Id" uuid NOT NULL,
    "FullName" character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    "Email" character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    "PhoneNumber" character varying(20),
    "Address_Street" character varying(100),
    "Address_Street2" character varying(100),
    "Address_City" character varying(50),
    "Address_State" character varying(2),
    "Address_ZipCode" character varying(10),
    "Address_Country" character varying(50),
    "EmployeeId" character varying(50) NOT NULL,
    "Department" character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    "Title" integer NOT NULL,
    "Status" integer NOT NULL,
    "HireDate" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "DateOfBirth" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "Specializations" text[] NOT NULL,
    "Qualifications" text[] NOT NULL,
    "MaxCoursesPerSemester" integer NOT NULL,
    "CurrentCourseLoad" integer NOT NULL,
    "OfficeLocation" text,
    "OfficeHours" text,
    "CreatedAt" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "UpdatedAt" timestamp with time zone,
    "CreatedBy" text,
    "UpdatedBy" text,
    "DeletedAt" timestamp with time zone,
    "DeletedBy" text,
    "Version" bytea,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_Teachers" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);

commandText:
SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Students" AS s
WHERE s."Status" = @__status_Value_0

SELECT s."Id", s."CreatedAt", s."CreatedBy", s."CurrentGPA", s."DateOfBirth", s."DeletedAt", s."DeletedBy", s."Email", s."EnrollmentDate", s."FullName", s."PhoneNumber", s."Status", s."UpdatedAt", s."UpdatedBy", s."Version", s."Address_City", s."Address_Country", s."Address_State", s."Address_Street", s."Address_Street2", s."Address_ZipCode"
FROM "Students" AS s
WHERE s."Status" = @__status_Value_0
ORDER BY s."FullName"
LIMIT @__p_2 OFFSET @__p_1
